sources.name: FIFA official fixtures/results page
sources.notes: Official source for scores, fixtures, result status, and knockout confirmations. This app does not fetch it automatically in this phase.

sources.name: FIFA official schedule PDF
sources.notes: Baseline schedule reference for fixtures, dates, venues, and match numbering.

sources.name: Internal app match data
sources.notes: The app renders match content from this controlled data file.

sources.name: Manual override policy
sources.notes: Manual overrides are accepted only when source_name, source_url, and checked_at are supplied and validation passes.
